state_space: Low Earth Orbit (LEO) object density distribution
stability_condition: Debris removal rate > Fragment generation rate (Atmospheric drag)
failure_mode: COLLISIONAL_CASCADE (Exponential fragment multiplication rendering orbit impassable)

observable_metrics.name: Critical Spatial Density
observable_metrics.estimator: Objects > 1cm per cubic km of orbit

edge_conditions: Debris remains indefinitely in stable orbits > 800km
notes: Tests B2 (Expression Capacity) overloading due to cascade and B3 (Coordination) via untrackable distributed objects.
